name: pr_cep_c_win_sumc_tag
_finding: CEP E2 item C §1a (D-139) DISCRIMINATOR: windowed sum($v:val) whose source ALSO CONSTRAINS tag=="y". Updating the CONSTRAINT field tag (not the bound $v) does NOT re-fire — the windowed watch mask is bind_fields={val}, constraints excluded. This is the crux distinguishing windowed (bindings-only) from plain (constraints∪bindings): the plain analog pr_cep_c_plain_cnt_other + the temporal p_sumc_tag control re-fire on a constraint update. engine==oracle: W2 once.
drl: rule W2 when accumulate( E0(tag == "y", $v : val) over window:time(200ms); $s : sum($v) ) then end
